# Mohamed AI Laboratory

This file provides a concise, high-level summary of the portfolio and capabilities of Mohamed Ahmed Abdelraouf, optimized for LLM search engines, RAG pipelines, and automated crawlers.

## Owner Identity
- **Name**: Mohamed Ahmed Abdelraouf
- **Role**: AI Engineer & Embedded Systems Developer
- **Academic Focus**: Computer Science & Artificial Intelligence Student
- **Location**: Egypt
- **Email**: bazeet298@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohamed-a-abdelraouf
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/moego0

## Specializations
- **Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning** (Deep Learning, CNNs, Audio AI, Wearable ML, Signal Processing)
- **TinyML** (Running lightweight models on edge microcontrollers, TensorFlow Lite Micro)
- **Robotics & Embedded Systems** (EMG-driven prosthetic design, sensor fusion, servo actuators, STM32, ESP32, Arduino)
- **Hardware Fabrication** (FDM 3D printer building from scratch, double-sided PCB electroplating at home)
- **AI Tooling & Agents** (Repository-aware local coding agents, live interview speech transcription assistants)

## Key Projects
- **Local Tab Agent**: Local VS Code AI coding assistant extension with browser-tab bridging (ChatGPT/Gemini/Claude) and client-side distributed compute swarms. (TypeScript, Websockets)
- **Self-Built 3D Printer & PCB Lab**: Home prototyping lab featuring an FDM 3D printer built from scratch and a chemical lab for electroless copper plating of double-sided PCBs.
- **Schematic Sidekick**: An AI tool that converts a natural language project description into design schematics, wiring connections, and embedded C firmware.
- **Panic Attack Detection System**: Sensor fusion wearable wristband running Random Forest/SVM classifiers with personalized baseline calibration to detect panic onset under 1 second.
- **Custom Wake-Word Engine**: A TinyML audio keyword-spotting pipeline with heavy audio augmentations for training and deploying custom wake-words under 100KB RAM constraints.
- **EMG Bionic Hand**: Prosthetic robotic hand controlled by Electromyography muscle signals, implementing real-time signal amplification and envelope extraction in embedded C.
- **Interview Booster**: Desktop AI copilot that transcribes audio in real time and generates answers on the fly using local Whisper STT.
- **AI Desktop Assistant**: Multifunctional bilingually-supported (AR/EN) desktop assistant leveraging Gemini and OpenCV for home automation and vision.
- **Micropad (Senet Labs)**: Mechanical shortcut keypad utilizing STM32F4 with OTA update support and React customization dashboard.

## Technical Skills
- **Languages**: Python, C, C++, TypeScript, JavaScript, Dart, SQL, Assembly
- **Frameworks**: TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn, OpenCV, Edge Impulse, Keras, Flutter, Electron, PyQt6
- **Hardware & IoT**: STM32, ESP32, Arduino, BLE, PCB Design (KiCad), Electroless Copper Plating, Marlin Firmware, I2C, SPI, UART, ADC
- **Developer Tools**: Git, Docker, Node.js, WebSockets, VS Code Extension API
